name: sendjob-intake

nodes.name: Get Current Job State
nodes.notes:
E02S04 AC1: Fetches most recent job for this client regardless of status.
Used to build the guard SMS when 'Job is New?' fires FALSE (no New job found).

Query: jobs?client_id=eq.[id]&select=id,status,tech_id,techs(name)&order=created_at.desc&limit=1
The ?select=techs(name) Supabase join returns tech name via jobs_tech_id_fkey.

Supabase join result: $('Get Current Job State').item.json.techs will be:
  { name: 'Mike' }  if tech is assigned
  null              if no tech assigned (AC4: omit tech name gracefully)

AC5: Supabase returns first element directly in n8n 2.x HTTP Request — access fields as:
  $('Get Current Job State').item.json.id       → job UUID
  $('Get Current Job State').item.json.status   → e.g. 'Assigned', 'En Route'
  $('Get Current Job State').item.json.techs    → { name: '...' } or null

IMPORTANT: Replace SUPABASE_ANON_KEY_PLACEHOLDER with actual anon key.
RLS: anon SELECT on jobs table already confirmed (established E02S05).

nodes.name: Build Guard SMS
nodes.notes:
E02S04 AC3, AC4: Assembles 'already assigned' guard SMS.

AC3: Message format: 'Job #[ID] is already [status]. Assigned to [Tech Name].'
  - Job ID: last 6 chars of UUID, uppercased (conventions.md)
  - status: live value from Supabase (e.g. 'Assigned', 'En Route', 'On Site', 'Complete')
  - Tech Name: from Supabase join (techs.name via jobs_tech_id_fkey)

AC4: If job.techs is null (no tech assigned), tech name clause is omitted:
  Message becomes: 'Job #[ID] is already [status].'

Edge case: If no jobs exist at all for this client, a fallback message is sent.
This is a belt-and-suspenders guard — in practice, if Job is New? fires false,
a job must exist (the query returned a row but status != New is impossible since
we filtered status=eq.New — so false = no row returned = no jobs in New status).
The Get Current Job State fetch retrieves the most recent job regardless of status.

n8n 2.x reference pattern:
  ALWAYS: $('Node Name').item.json.field
  Code node output: return [{ json: { ... } }]

nodes.name: Send Guard SMS
nodes.notes:
E02S04 AC3, AC5: Sends 'already assigned' guard SMS to dispatcher.

AC5: from_number = clients.twilio_number (same Twilio number as original job alert).
  Pulled from 'Get Client by Phone' node — never hardcoded.

AC2: No assignment is made — this node is on the false branch of 'Job is New?'.
  The job record is NOT modified. This node only sends an informational SMS.

continueOnFail=true: SMS failure does not block workflow execution.
Native n8n Twilio node — NOT HTTP Request (conventions.md, DEC-006).

CREDENTIAL SETUP: Same 'twilio-credentials' credential as other Twilio nodes.
Update credential id after creating/verifying in n8n → Settings → Credentials.

_NOTES: COMBINED WORKFLOW: E02S01 + E02S02 + E02S03 + E02S04
TRUE path (tech found, job is New):
Webhook → Respond to Webhook → Parse SMS Fields → Get Client by Phone
→ Client Found? → Extract Tech Name → Get Tech by Name → Tech Found? [TRUE]
→ Get Latest New Job → Job is New? [TRUE] → Assign Job → Build Confirmation SMS
→ Send Confirmation SMS
FALSE path — tech NOT found (E02S03):
Tech Found? [FALSE] → Fetch All Techs → Build Error SMS → Send Error SMS
FALSE path — job not New / already assigned (E02S04):
Job is New? [FALSE] → Get Current Job State → Build Guard SMS → Send Guard SMS
Guard SMS: 'Job #[ID] is already [status]. Assigned to [Tech Name].'
If no tech assigned, tech name clause is omitted (AC4).
BEFORE ACTIVATING:
1. Replace SUPABASE_ANON_KEY_PLACEHOLDER in ALL 6 HTTP Request nodes:
- Get Client by Phone
- Get Tech by Name
- Get Latest New Job
- Assign Job
- Fetch All Techs
- Get Current Job State  ← NEW (E02S04)
Source: Supabase Dashboard → Project Settings → API → anon public
2. Configure Twilio credentials in n8n — applies to:
- Send Confirmation SMS
- Send Error SMS
- Send Guard SMS  ← NEW (E02S04)
3. Ensure a job with status=New exists in Supabase for testing
MANUAL WIRING REQUIRED after import (n8n v2 import bug):
- Verify 'Tech Found?' FALSE output (index 1) connects to 'Fetch All Techs'
(n8n may re-wire to TRUE output on import — check and correct manually)
- Verify 'Job is New?' FALSE output (index 1) connects to 'Get Current Job State'
(same n8n v2 bug — check and correct manually after import)
E02S04 TEST PROCEDURE:
1. Ensure a job exists in Supabase with status != New (e.g. 'Assigned')
2. POST to webhook: Body=Mike&From=[dispatcher_phone]&To=[twilio_number]
3. Verify 'Job is New?' fires FALSE
4. Verify 'Get Current Job State' fetches the job (check n8n execution log)
5. Verify dispatcher receives SMS: 'Job #[ID] is already Assigned. Assigned to [Tech Name].'
6. Verify NO PATCH was made to the jobs table (AC2)
